Government Orders: -
Under the state government's ambitious plan of Vikas Maharashtra 2047, the government
Capacity building needs to take place beyond the last element of the service. under each of the departments.
It is necessary to identify the training requirements required for those positions by determining the duties responsibilities post-wise.
The following are the field offices under the Department of Medical Education.
1) Directorate of Medical Education and Research, Mumbai
2) Directorate of AYUSH, Mumbai

para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: Narrow-0526 / Q.No.75 / PRASHT-1
The aforesaid Committee shall perform their duties for the cadre under the Department of Medical Education and
Identify the responsibilities followed by their training needs and required training programs IGOT AI
Department of General Administration as well as the Central Government with the help of the Tool.
The Committee is headed by the Chairman Secretary (Medical Education Department) by preparing a roadmap as per the instructions given in this regard.
and Nodal Officer Smt. Shwetambari Prof. Khade, Deputy Secretary, Medical Education and Medicine
Submit to the Department of Finance, Mantralaya, Mumbai.
This Government Order is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
